Offline-first desktop platform

One premium hub for board, card, and party nights.

TableTop Nexus brings polished built-in classics, local multiplayer, AI-backed practice, profile-aware stats, hosted rooms, creator tools, and downloadable desktop builds into one smooth tabletop lounge.

Download v1.0.2 Browse the game catalogue

Latest stable release: v1.0.2 on 2026-04-07. Installers stay hosted on GitHub Releases.

Windows macOS Linux Offline play Profile sync ready
Why it lands

Designed for casual pick-up play and long-term replayability.

Offline-first desktop app with local saves, tutorials, and stats export

Built with a launcher-style shell, reusable in-game chrome, and a clean path from quick match to deeper creator and stats tools.

Board, card, and party games in one launcher-style hub

Built with a launcher-style shell, reusable in-game chrome, and a clean path from quick match to deeper creator and stats tools.

Local multiplayer, AI support for supported titles, and host-authoritative party rooms

Built with a launcher-style shell, reusable in-game chrome, and a clean path from quick match to deeper creator and stats tools.

Template-driven creator tools, mods, and per-profile match history

Built with a launcher-style shell, reusable in-game chrome, and a clean path from quick match to deeper creator and stats tools.

Featured games

Launch-night favourites and strategy staples.

Board

Chess

Classic tactics with legal move handling, move history, and offline play.

Board

Battleship

Fleet placement, hit tracking, and satisfying solo or local duels.

Card

Blackjack

Quick casino sessions with dealer logic, chip tracking, and polished table visuals.

Card

Hearts

Trick-taking pressure with rotating turns and score-aware play.

Card

Crazy Eights

Wild eights, suit shifts, and family-friendly discard pile tension.

Board

Ludo

Bright race-table momentum with captures, six-roll swings, and couch play.

Board

Backgammon

Dice-driven checker races with modern readability and quick setup.

Party

Trivia

Multiple-choice rounds, score tracking, and pack-ready prompt content.

Party

Drawing Club

Shared canvas play with rotating prompts and low-friction local scoring.

Party

Bluffing Room

Pass-and-play deduction where one player gets the wrong word.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
